truthful_notice: The public Site-owned inventory, evidence inspection, classification, next-action, and telemetry workflow is installed. No bot-authored cycle result has yet been observed, so repository counts and completion results are not claimed here.

nodes.title: Public ecosystem truth cycle
nodes.current_step: Repository-owned scheduled cycle installed in Site; first machine execution remains unobserved.

nodes.title: Define public ecosystem scope
nodes.result: Nine organizations are configured. Private repository coverage is explicitly excluded from the public claim.

nodes.title: Install public inventory and evidence runner
nodes.result: Runner can enumerate public repositories, inspect objective/runtime evidence, classify fail-closed, generate next actions, and write live telemetry.

nodes.title: Install hourly public telemetry workflow
nodes.result: GitHub Actions workflow is configured to persist inventory, next actions, and the visible task tree without cross-repository secrets.

nodes.title: Observe first machine-authored public cycle
nodes.current_step: Waiting for a GitHub Actions bot commit that persists actual public repository counts, classifications, evidence results, and actions.

nodes.title: Dispatch repository remediation branches
nodes.current_step: Requires the persisted next-action queue from the first machine-authored public cycle.

corrective_actions.action: Observe and verify the first Site-owned public autonomy workflow run
corrective_actions.reason: Installation is verified, but no bot-authored output commit has appeared yet.

completed_history.title: Public autonomy cycle installation
completed_history.result: Public scope, autonomous runner, hourly persistence workflow, and local Site telemetry source are installed.
